title: Village Farms International Inc (VFF) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Revenue Growth Amid Challenges
text: Village Farms International reported Q4 2024 revenue of $83 million, an 11% year-over-year increase. Fresh Produce Q4 Sales were $43.3 million, a 17% increase year over year. Canadian cannabis achieved 31% growth in net sales for 2024. VFF maintains the number 3 position in Canada's cannabis market with leading dried flower sales. International medicinal exports surged 113% year-over-year; company targets tripling this in 2025. The company experienced a non-cash inventory write-down of $10.5 million in Canadian cannabis due to quality concerns. Net loss was $8.6 million ($0.08 per share) for Q4, including the write-down. Adjusted EBITDA excluding write-down was $7 million for Q4, the highest in four years. Cash position at Q4 close was $24.6 million, with net debt of $15.9 million. Operating cash flow was $10.5 million for the full year.
